prestazioni: AMG M159 6.2L V8 (engine code: M159 E63) forced induction via Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with billet compressor wheels, 106mm titanium-aluminide turbine wheels, and 4.0 bar (58 psi) wastegates, paired with a custom AMG Performance Studio ECU reflash (part #A2089800326) to target 950 hp at 8,200 RPM on 100-octane fuel with a 9.0:1 static compression ratio and ported cylinder heads featuring 3-angle valve seats and sodium-filled exhaust valves

Bespoke HGP Turbo Systems twin-turbo kit with 4.0-inch V-band downpipes, 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system, and a secondary catalytic converter delete (replaced with GESI 300-cell race cats), mated to a custom AMG GT Black Series-derived dry-sump oil system with an external 12-quart Moroso accumulator tank and dual Scavenger Series 4-stage oil pumps

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed rebound), custom valving for the SLS Black Series subframe geometry, and spherical bearing top mounts (part #OHL-KA0-TTX46-2S), paired with a H&R Monoball subframe reinforcement kit (part #HNR-516 001) and AP Racing CP9450 front 6-piston calipers with 405mm CCM-X carbon-ceramic rotors
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (part #RB-SLS-03) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, featuring a 50mm extended wheelbase and custom 3D-scanned OEM-matched paint (Mercedes Designo Magno Alanite Grey, code 0485)

AMG Carbon Fiber Engine Cover (part #A2087800026) with exposed M159 engine bay detailing, including a custom titanium bolt kit (ARP part #134-8501) and a heat-wrapped intake manifold (DEI Titanium wrap, part #010160) with ceramic-coated runners

BBS FI-R 10x20-inch front and 12x20-inch rear forged wheels (part #BBS-FIR-SLS-BS) in matte gold finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 325/25 R20 rear) with custom AMG center caps (part #A2084010002) and titanium lug bolts (McGard part #24157)
